name: supabase
description: Supabase schema introspection, RLS policy inspection, auth config discovery. Lets the factory introspect the live DB instead of guessing table shapes.
notes: Read-only by default. For schema migrations, factory still uses Supabase CLI, not MCP. Secret: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is privileged — scope MCP to a read-only key when possible.
